projects.title: Multi-Agent RAG System
projects.description: A multi-agent Retrieval-Augmented Generation app built with Streamlit and LangChain, where multiple agents collaborate to retrieve and answer questions over your documents.

projects.title: RAG Chatbot
projects.description: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation chatbot in Python that answers questions grounded strictly in your own documents.

projects.title: LangChain RAG for Document Understanding
projects.description: Two RAG pipelines, one using OpenAI and one fully open-source with Hugging Face, that answer questions over a PDF using LangChain and FAISS.

projects.title: Credit-Card Fraud Detection (MLOps)
projects.description: An end-to-end MLOps pipeline for credit-card fraud detection, covering model training, experiment tracking, and deployment on highly imbalanced data.

projects.title: End-to-End MLOps Pipeline
projects.description: A full-stack MLOps workflow with Infrastructure-as-Code on GCP, using Terraform, BigQuery, dbt, Prefect, MLflow, FastAPI, and CI/CD.

projects.title: Diabetic Retinopathy Screening
projects.description: A deep learning model that grades diabetic retinopathy severity from retinal fundus images, reaching about 94.7% accuracy with Keras and TensorFlow.

projects.title: NLP Text Analysis App
projects.description: An interactive Streamlit app for NLP text analysis, covering sentiment, keywords, and text statistics right in the browser.

projects.title: Gender & Age Prediction
projects.description: Real-time gender and age estimation from face images using OpenCV deep learning models.
